name: Hypnotic Pattern
description: You create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot Cube within range. Each creature in the area who can see it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration; while Charmed it is Incapacitated and has a Speed of 0. The effect ends for a creature if it takes damage or someone uses an action to shake it out of its stupor.
